creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/a.8.20110223062852/vis5d+-1.2.1_15.log

The bug seems to be in libtool.  If I run a command like

libtool -mode=link g++45 stuff stuff

libtool uses c++ instead of g++45.

Fix: This proposed solution is a terrible hack.  It would be better to fix libtool.  But it does work, and if someone isn't going to fix libtool soon, this will do as a bandaid.
